query:
INSERT INTO product_images (productId, imageUrl, imageKey, sortOrder, isPrimary, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/vOsWHOPsGokWBLgm.png', 'dining-table-01.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DT-001-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/kXIylnNmErjGqByk.png', 'dining-table-02.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DT-002-MRB'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/jCvzBuHlgrHbARTd.png', 'dining-table-03.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DT-003-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/OHaGUvmCtKYHWUhm.png', 'dining-table-04.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DT-004-GLS'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/hlRPTuZbNvyOrlnj.png', 'dining-table-05.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'DT-005-ACA';
